generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "cart movement stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval Motor Controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "hoist movement stepper motor controlled by TMC4671-Eval Motor Controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "structural frame of the gantry crane"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "motor controller for cart and hoist stepper motors"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "power supply unit for the crane system"
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "swing angle time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "wind speed time-series data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "containerization tool for deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, HMIForOperatorControl
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "visualization tool for data dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaDataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, HMIForOperatorControl
]

instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneSimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
]

instance ArduinoIDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "hardware programming environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables HMIForOperatorControl
]

instance KiCad : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "hardware design tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables HMIForOperatorControl
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "historical data logging"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance GrafanaDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardAlerts
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardAlerts
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "crane simulation service"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "fault detection using time series classification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance HMIForOperatorControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human Machine Interface (HMI) for operator control"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlAction
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created using Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "simulation model of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance DarTwinNotation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "evolution tracking using DarTwin notation"
]

instance DashboardAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard alerts operators for validation threshold breaches"
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "fault localization insights from time series classification"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "trajectory optimization for efficient crane movement"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "historical data logging for analysis"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "simulation results for crane dynamics analysis"
]

instance OperatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "operator control via Human Machine Interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CentralizedDTSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system with multiple integrated services"
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, TMC4671EvalMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, PowerSupplyUnit, Docker, TimescaleDB, Grafana, EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker, PythonGantrylibModule, AutodeskFusion360, ArduinoIDE, KiCad, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneSimulationService, FaultDetectionService, HMIForOperatorControl, CADModel, KinematicModel, SimulationModel, SwingAngleTimeSeriesData, WindSpeedTimeSeriesData, DashboardAlerts, FaultLocalizationInsight, TrajectoryOptimizationInsight, HistoricalDataInsight, SimulationInsight, OperatorControlAction, DarTwinNotation
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (optimal trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service) sent from Control Application to Physical Crane Interface, which drives the Cart and Hoist Motors."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for data logging and validation, with no specific time intervals specified but described as 'continuous' in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture with physical crane connected to a PC running Docker containers for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard; Python services for control, logging, trajectory generation, simulation, and validation integrated via MQTT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion 360), manufactured (physical hardware), and operated (real-time data logging and validation during crane operation) stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulation outputs using distance metrics and thresholds; confidence bounds derived from simulations displayed in Grafana dashboard to assess model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Python-based interface for physical crane control; SQL queries for TimescaleDB data access."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a personal computer; Docker containers for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, and Grafana; Python gantrylib module deployed via pip installation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "No specific standards adhered to; ad-hoc implementation using open-source tools without formal digital twin standards."
]
